violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelves above main cook/food area observed with debris build up where clean dishware and glassware are stored.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of cut vegetables house made sauces potatoes was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the kitchen under counter coolers and in the basement walk in cooler.
